Name: Eskom Kusile Power Station – Unit 6 Boiler Steel Structure Erection Complete
Description: Proof-of-work milestone for completion of Unit 6 boiler steel structure erection at Kusile Power Station. 4,800 t of structural steel erected and bolted-up; 100% dimensional check passed. Certified by Eskom project manager and CIDB Grades 8+9 verification team.

Name: Cape Town International Convention Centre Expansion – Structural Frame Complete
Description: Milestone for structural steel frame and composite slabs completion for the CTICC East Wing expansion (18,000 m² net new GLA). All structural elements certified by Aurecon engineers and CIDB Grade 9 principal contractor compliance check.

Name: Johannesburg CBD Pedestrian Bridge Network – Annual Structural Safety Inspection 2024
Description: Annual structural safety inspection certificate for 28 pedestrian bridges in the Johannesburg CBD. Inspected per SANS 10160 and CIDB Bridge Inspection Framework. 25 pass, 3 flagged for minor repairs. Issued by CIDB and Joburg Roads Agency.

Name: CIDB–CETA Artisan Carpentry & Joinery NQF Level 3 Training Programme Certificate – Cohort 1
Description: Completion certificate for CIDB–CETA accredited Artisan Carpentry and Joinery (NQF Level 3) training programme. 62 beneficiaries successfully certified at the CIDB Regional Training Centre, Johannesburg. SETA registered learning programme LP98034.

Name: CIDB–CETA Bricklaying & Plastering NQF Level 2 Training Certificate – Cohort 3
Description: Completion certificate for CIDB–CETA Bricklaying and Plastering (NQF Level 2) training. 80 beneficiaries certified. Delivered at CIDB Eastern Cape Regional Training Centre, Port Elizabeth. LP98012 learning programme.

Name: Durban Point Waterfront Development – Phase 2 Quay Wall Marine Works Complete
Description: Milestone for completion of 420 m reinforced concrete quay wall and 1.8 ha dredging programme for Durban Point Waterfront Phase 2. Certified by Transnet National Ports Authority, WSP marine engineers and CIDB Grade 9 compliance.

Name: Soweto Schools Infrastructure Programme – Ablution Block Refurbishment Certificate 2024
Description: Completion certificate for ablution block refurbishment at 140 Soweto schools under the DHET/DBE Schools Infrastructure Backlog Eradication Programme. 420 ablution blocks refurbished. Certified by CIDB Grade 4–6 contractors and Gauteng DHET.

Name: CIDB Construction Health & Safety Representative NQF Level 4 Certificate – Cohort 2
Description: Completion certificate for Construction Health and Safety Representative training (NQF Level 4, CETA accredited) for 45 construction supervisors. Delivered at CIDB Western Cape Regional Centre, Cape Town. SETA registered LP98215.

Name: Tshwane Bulk Water Reservoir – Pre-Commissioning Civil Works Inspection Certificate
Description: Pre-commissioning civil works inspection certificate for 50 Ml Tshwane Bulk Water Reservoir. Structural integrity tests, crack survey and leak tests (hydrostatic) 100% pass. Certified by Tshwane Metro, SAICE and CIDB Grade 8 contractor compliance.

Name: King Shaka International Airport Cargo Terminal Expansion – Foundation Slab Complete
Description: Milestone for 16,500 m² post-tensioned concrete foundation slab for KSIA Cargo Terminal expansion. Cube strength tests 100% pass (≥ 40 MPa). Certified by ACSA project manager and CIDB Grade 9 compliance check.

Name: Limpopo Rural Clinic Maintenance Programme – Certificate Q2 2024
Description: Maintenance completion certificate for Q2 2024 programme covering 88 Limpopo DoH rural health clinics. Works include roof repairs (62), electrical upgrades (48), plumbing (88) and external painting (88). Certified by CIDB and Limpopo DoH.

Name: CIDB–CETA Scaffolding Erection & Inspection NQF Level 2 Certificate – KwaZulu-Natal Cohort
Description: Completion certificate for Scaffolding Erection and Inspection (NQF Level 2) training programme. 55 beneficiaries certified at CIDB KwaZulu-Natal Training Centre, Durban. All 55 receive 3-year scaffolding competency cards per DoL requirements.

Name: Johannesburg Metro Bus Depot – Annual Building Compliance Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Annual building compliance inspection certificate for the Johannesburg Metro Bus Depot (Turffontein). Structural, fire, electrical and plumbing inspection per SANS 10400 NBR. Building fully compliant. Issued by City of Joburg Building Inspectorate and CIDB.

Name: Waterfall City Mixed-Use Development – Phase 3 Podium Deck Complete
Description: Milestone for Level 4 podium deck (post-tensioned concrete, 42,000 m²) for Waterfall City Phase 3. 320 MN of post-tensioning successfully stressed; all cube tests pass. Certified by Attacq, Aurecon and CIDB Grade 9 contractor compliance.

Name: Cape Town Metro Schools Roof Repair Programme Certificate 2024
Description: Completion certificate for emergency roof repair programme (flat roof waterproofing system replacement) for 96 City of Cape Town public schools. 340,000 m² of roofing replaced. Certified by CIDB Grade 4 contractors and Western Cape DBE.

Name: CIDB Contractor Development Programme – SMME Contractor Graduation Certificate 2024
Description: Graduation certificate for 120 SMME construction contractors completing the CIDB Contractor Development Programme (CDP). Graduates progress from CIDB Grade 1–3 to Grade 4–5 registration. Programme funded by National Treasury and DBSA.

Name: Transnet Port Terminal Ngqura – Wharf 2 Extension Concrete Works Complete
Description: Milestone for marine concrete works (1,200 m² wharf slab + 8 deep-water pile caps) for Ngqura Container Terminal Wharf 2 extension. Chloride resistance tests pass (≤ 0.4%). Certified by Transnet NPA, GIBB marine and CIDB Grade 9.

Name: Free State Social Housing Portfolio – Annual Structural Condition Assessment 2024
Description: Annual structural condition assessment for 3,200 Free State Social Housing Regulatory Authority (SHRA) units across 14 developments. 3,060 units serviceable; 140 require structural intervention. Certified by CIDB and Free State DoHS.

Name: Pretoria Government Precinct – Annual Building Maintenance Certificate 2024
Description: Annual building maintenance certificate for 22 DPW-managed national government buildings in the Pretoria Government Precinct. Works: roof maintenance, HVAC servicing, fire system maintenance, electrical compliance. Certified by CIDB and DPW.

Name: Polokwane Logistics Hub – Cold Store Facility Insulated Panel Installation Complete
Description: Milestone for PIR insulated cold-store panels installation (12,000 m² at -18°C and 4,000 m² at 0°C) for Polokwane Logistics Hub cold storage facility. Temperature homogeneity test passes. Certified by CSIR and CIDB Grade 8 contractor.

Name: Durban Metro Water Infrastructure – Annual SANS 241 Compliance Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Annual water infrastructure compliance inspection certificate for 42 eThekwini Metropolitan water treatment plants and pump stations. All inspected per SANS 241 drinking water quality standard. 38 fully compliant; 4 sites issued with improvement notices.

Name: CIDB–CETA Concrete Form-Working & Shuttering NQF Level 2 Certificate – Mpumalanga Cohort
Description: Completion certificate for Concrete Form-Working and Shuttering (NQF Level 2) training for 50 construction workers at CIDB Mpumalanga Training Centre, Nelspruit. All 50 achieve CETA trade certificate. LP98041 learning programme.

Name: Emfuleni WWTW Upgrade – Tertiary Treatment Bioreactor Installation Complete
Description: Milestone for membrane bioreactor (MBR) installation (4 trains × 10 Ml/d capacity) at Emfuleni Wastewater Treatment Works upgrade. Commissioning hydraulic tests pass. Certified by Rand Water, WSP and CIDB Grade 9 compliance.

Name: Northern Cape Provincial Hospital Portfolio – Annual Mechanical & Electrical Maintenance Certificate 2024
Description: Annual mechanical and electrical maintenance certificate for 14 Northern Cape DoH provincial hospitals. Works: HVAC preventive maintenance, medical gas pipeline test and certification, fire suppression system test, generator servicing. Certified by CIDB and NC DoH.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – CIDB Grade 9 Principal Contractor Compliance Audit Certificate
Description: CIDB Grades 9 compliance audit certificate for the principal contractor (Concor-Group 5 JV) on the N2 Wild Coast Toll Road. Audited for BBBEE procurement, sub-contracting to Grade 2–4 local firms, skills spend and payroll employment. Issued by CIDB Registrar.
